This is a testharness.js-based test.

[FAIL] CR at <first> should result in Network Error (fetch)
  assert_unreached: Should have rejected: undefined Reached unreachable code

  assert_unreached: Should have rejected: undefined Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] SP at <first> should result in Network Error (fetch)
  assert_unreached: Should have rejected: undefined Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] COLON at <first> should result in Network Error (fetch)
  assert_unreached: Should have rejected: undefined Reached unreachable code
